content.question: What is the current (2024-2026) rate and geographic distribution of village-school closures under KLIK authority, and how do closure rates correlate with local political affiliation or prior mobilization history?
content.reduction_path: Obtain KLIK administrative records on closure/merger decisions by village and year; cross-reference closure data with electoral geography (Fidesz strongholds versus opposition-leaning rural districts) and prior protest activity.
